title: rubus × falsiferox
intro: Rubus × falsiferox, also known as the false black raspberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining characteristics of the black raspberry and the raspberry. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × falsiferox include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × falsiferox can be found in supplements, teas, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine.
